revision.comment: [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2021 December 23#Category:NPOV disputes]]
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:POV]]

{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{POV}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = POV | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | small = {{{small|}}} | type = content | class = ambox-POV | style = {{{style|}}} | image = [[File:Unbalanced scales.svg|50x40px|link=]] | issue = The '''[[Wikipedia:Neutral point of view|neutrality]] of this {{{what|article}}} is [[Wikipedia:NPOV dispute|disputed]]'''. | talk = {{{talk|#}}} | fix = Please do not remove this message until [[Template:POV#When to remove|conditions to do so are met]]. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Wikipedia neutral point of view disputes | all = All Wikipedia neutral point of view disputes }}<!--{{POV}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things

Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
